Job description

About Us

NexKey Collective is a real estate investment startup founded by Kristie DeLouise (Parsons alum and former VP of UX at JPMorgan) and her husband/co-founder, John Matland. We help investors and wholesalers close creative deals using automation, AI tools, and networked connections.

Co-wholesaling and dispositions of JV partner deals are central to our business model. We‚Äôre building an innovative platform that personalizes property matching for investors and wholesalers.

¬Ý

Role Overview

We‚Äôre seeking multiple Tech & Automation Interns to help scale our systems and platform. You‚Äôll work on:

Database management and data strategy (Airtable, data storage solutions)
Building and optimizing automations and API integrations (Zapier, Make, Go High Level)
Supporting website development and feature enhancements (WordPress, Webflow, no-code)
Assisting in AI-powered tool and workflow development (calculators, lead scoring, chat integrations)
Collaborating on scalable data + AI solutions to improve platform efficiency

¬Ý

Skills We‚Äôre Looking For

No-code tools: Airtable, Zapier/Make, Webflow, WordPress
API integration, data management, and workflow automation
Interest in AI solutions (chatbots, automation agents)
Curiosity for startups, real estate tech, and growth-oriented systems
Problem-solving, self-starting, adaptable, eager to learn

¬Ý

What You‚Äôll Gain

Real-world experience in building tech for startups
Mentorship from experienced founders in UX and real estate
Portfolio-worthy projects you can showcase
Flexible schedule, remote work
Opportunity for future freelance or paid roles

¬Ý

Details

Remote, ~20-30 hrs/week
Duration: 6‚Äì8 months (extendable)

¬Ý

Unpaid internship ‚Äì educational experience for skill development and portfolio building. This internship is unpaid. Students should consult their school‚Äôs Internship or Experiential Learning department to determine if academic credit can be arranged.
